parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
actor "Crapchat user" as user1
actor "Another Crapchat user" as user2
participant "Crapchat REST API" as api
participant "Crapchat identity provider" as idp
database "Crapchat storage" as db

group Search user
    activate user1
    user1 --> api : HTTP POST request with search query
    activate api
    api -> idp : HTTP request with search query
    activate idp
    idp --> api : HTTP response with list of users
    deactivate idp
    api --> user1 : HTTP response with array of users
    deactivate api
end

group Send follow request
    user1 -> user1 : Clicks follow button
    user1 --> api : HTTP request with ID of the user to follow
    activate api
    api -> db : SQL insert query
    activate db
    db -> api : Success response
    deactivate db
    api -> user2 : Notify with follow request
    activate user2
    api -> user1 : HTTP OK response
    deactivate api
    deactivate user1
end

group Accept follow request
    user2 --> api : HTTP request to accept
    activate api
    api -> db : SQL update query
    activate db
    db -> api : Success response
    deactivate db
    api --> user2 : HTTP OK response
    deactivate api
    deactivate user2
end
@enduml
```
